name: @ted-too/query-key-factory
description: Typesafe query key management for TanStack Query with support for nested query factory merges.
author: Ted Too <tedtoo6@outlook.com>

scripts.build:smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const required=['q','createQueryKeyStore','createQueryKeys','mergeQueryKeys','tupleKey','static','dynamic']; const mod=await import(new URL('./dist/q.js', 'file://' + process.cwd() + '/')); for (const key of required) { if (!(key in mod)) throw new Error('Missing export: ' + key); } for (const key of required.filter((key) => key !== 'q')) { if (typeof mod[key] !== 'function') throw new Error('Export is not callable: ' + key); } if (typeof mod.q !== 'object' || mod.q === null) throw new Error('Export is not an object: q'); console.log('Verified dist exports:', required.join(', '));"
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:js && bun run build:types && bun run build:smoke
scripts.check: bun run check:types && bun run check:lint
